name: More Dark
short_description: More dark - is a two-dimensional platformer with a side view, with elements of puzzles. The game takes place in a strange place called hell. Not a single person who got there will be able to return back. Or can he still?
detailed_description:
After the lord of the other world went on vacation, his place was temporarily taken by the daughter Evilina. Not having time to comfortably settle in the throne, chaos and lawlessness began. All the prisoners scattered throughout the kingdom, saving themselves from eternal torment, thereby violating the usual idyll of this place.

Your task is to lead a detachment of demons and return everything to its place, deal with the rebels in the whole kingdom, cleaning one room after another. On your way you will find a lot of puzzles, as well as ingenious traps and obstacles that you can easily overcome with the help of improvised means.

The main feature of More dark is a stylish, pixel graphics, which together with the music conveys the atmosphere of a mysterious and gloomy kingdom.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Russian*, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
